heading: Availability of incentive payments for certain producers
label: 7999 Availability of incentive payments for certain producers

children.heading: Incentive payments required
children.label: a Incentive payments required
children.text: Subject to subsection (b), the Secretary shall make available a total of $20,000,000 of funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation during the 2003 through 2005 crop years to provide incentive payments to producers of hard white wheat.
only with regard to production that meets minimum quality criteria; and
on not more than 2,000,000 acres or the equivalent volume of production.

children.heading: Demand for wheat
children.label: c Demand for wheat
children.text: To be eligible to obtain an incentive payment under subsection (a), a producer shall demonstrate to the satisfaction of the Secretary that buyers and end-users are available for the wheat to be covered by the incentive payment.
